_comment: Dynamic tools configuration for Klawed Browser Controller.
_description: Copy or symlink this to .klawed/dynamic_tools.json, or set KLAWED_DYNAMIC_TOOLS env var.
_setup: Install the Chrome extension + Go host first: cd chrome_extension_native_messaging/host && make install EXTENSION_ID=<your-id>

function.name: BrowserControl
function.description:
Control a real Chrome/Chromium browser that has the Klawed Browser Controller extension installed and connected.

The extension must be installed and connected (green dot in Chrome toolbar) for this tool to work.

Available commands:
  Navigation: navigate, goBack, goForward, reload, newTab, closeTab, switchTab
  Tab info:   listTabs, getActiveTab
  Page info:  getPageInfo, getPageSource, getReadableText
  DOM:        click, type, getText, getHtml, getAttribute, findElements, getLinks, getForms
  Forms:      fillForm, submitForm, pressKey
  Scroll:     scroll, scrollBy, scrollToElement
  JS:         evaluate
  Wait:       waitForElement
  Screenshot: screenshot
  Debug:      ping, getInfo
